name: Kettlebell Swing
setup: Kettlebell on floor in front of you
Feet shoulder-width, slight bend in knees
execution: Hinge at hips, reach for kettlebell with two hands
Hike the bell back between your legs
Drive hips forward explosively, swinging bell to chest height
Let bell float, then hinge back and repeat
common_mistakes: Using arms to lift (should be hip drive)
Bell going above chest height (loses glute tension)
cues: Power comes from the hips, not shoulders
Squeeze glutes at the top like you're stopping a car
Bell is just along for the ride
Crush a walnut with your glutes at the top
